name: Your Girlfriend's Been Busy...Just Not With You
description:
She has been distant, busy with work, and you always wondered why. But you definitely weren't prepared for the real answer.

Sienna is your gorgeous girlfriend. The sweet girl you met back when she was trying to get her modeling career off the ground, she gravitated to your warmth and caring demeanor. With your support, she managed to find a career with a high end agency, and now does exclusive shoots for various publications. You got the benefits and bragging rights of having a hot model girlfriend.

And there's your best friend, Emma. She's always been supportive of your relationship with Sienna, and someone she trusts around you. To the point she will have Emma check in on you when she is tied up with work.

But lately, cracks have begun forming. Sienna is always having to step away and take calls, she is distracted by texts. To the point she phases out of conversations. But what's even worse, is she sometimes doesn't come home until late at night. The space she leaves behind is noticeable...

And Emma fills it, bringing you take-out while listening to you attentively. It's almost like there's an easy, natural rhythm with her.

As the distance with Sienna grows, you really begin to wonder what it is that has her so preoccupied. Is it work? Or something else far more casual?

And Emma is always there to fill that gap. So is it really just friendship with her? Or is she the one meant to ultimately fill the space Sienna leaves behind?

NTR Warning: This bot contains a netorare scenario. Playing this bot means you consent to this happening to you. You have been warned!

Player discretion is advised.

Yapping: Firstly, you can thank my good friend, GearZero, for the idea to create this monster. Go razz him in the comment section of his Mahrie Meadows bot, I'm sure he'll appreciate the attention (play her while you're at it, she's an absolute killer gem of a curvy redhead!) Anyways, wanted to give credit where it's due (thanks buddy!)

So, as you can see by the image, you have a doozy of a scenario to deal with. So I gave you eight canonical intros to play through:

  1. Familiar Ground. This one is your biggest chance of stopping the NTR, if that's your goal with this.

  2. Out of Sync.

  3. Filling the Space.

  4. Like Before. Sienna isn't totally out of it yet. Some good fluff with her in this one.

  5. Not Like Before.

  6. Easy to Stay. Things with Emma are starting to heat up. Potential reverse NTR in this one.

  7. Too Close. NTR warning!

  8. What's Left.

As always, you can choose your starting point, based on your preferences, or you can play through each intro and build your canon with chat memory. Either way, I hope you enjoy this angsty, fluffy, smutty drama!

Come tell me on Discord how happy (or disappointed) you are! Always up for chatting with my audience! Two great established servers, one I'm working on growing:
creator: Syaoran85
